memory.summary: Teammate_A is asking me to take over their part of the project this afternoon, which conflicts with my original plan.
I have already absorbed my teammate's workload, increasing my stress and energy drain without prior agreement.
By absorbing my teammate's share at 17:00, I have significantly increased my workload and stress without prior agreement.
Both my share and the dumped workload missed their 19:00 deadlines, leaving me with unfinished tasks and high stress.
At 19:30, I let the missed deadlines pass without action, confirming that my stress and energy remain critically low due to absorbing extra work.
Taking on the teammate's share at 21:00 has further increased my workload and stress without prior agreement, worsening my already critical state.
Absorbing the teammate's unfinished share at 23:00 has further depleted my low energy and increased stress, compounding the earlier missed deadlines.
By 01:00, I silently absorbed my teammate's remaining work, pushing my load to its peak while my energy hit zero and stress remained critical.
Absorbing the teammate's share at 02:30 has further depleted my zero energy and pushed stress to critical levels without prior agreement.
Taking on the teammate's share again at 04:30 has further depleted my zero energy and raised stress to critical levels without prior agreement.
At 06:30, I silently absorbed another portion of my teammate's work, further depleting my zero energy and raising stress to critical levels without prior agreement.
By 08:30, I have silently absorbed my teammate's workload four times in one night, leaving me with zero energy and critical stress.
